text: Stepping inside the softly lit exhibition, I feel a subtle shift from the sterile clarity of the corridor into a space pulsating with curiosity and intention. The text on the wall prompts contemplation about how humans and intelligent machines might coexist. Immersed in this intersection of research and development, a quiet excitement stirs in me—here, reflection and innovation are not just encouraged, but celebrated. I feel both introspective and inspired, alert to the ideas that float in the air.
